creator: brd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Diff updated, but it is just a small change:

Index: devel/boost-all/compiled.mk
===================================================================
--- devel/boost-all/compiled.mk (revision 381786)
+++ devel/boost-all/compiled.mk (working copy)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 USE_LDCONFIG=  yes
 PKGMESSAGE=    ${WRKDIR}/pkg-message
 BJAM=          bjam
-USES+=         compiler:c++11-lang
+USES+=         compiler:c++11-lib
